div1.entryFree: Rake, vb. to scrape, to gather as with a rake; with from, == to bring to light from under the covering earth: let me r. it from the earth, Gent. IV, 2, 116. from the dust of old oblivion --d, H5 II, 4, 87. With for, == to search for: even in your hearts, there will he r. for it, H5 II, 4, 98. With together, == to scrape together: how does he r. this together, H8 III, 2, 110. With up, == to cover up with earth, to bury: here in the sands thee I'll r. up, Lr. IV, 6, 281.
